title: Create workdoc template in default value
excerpt:
Hello, 
It could be nice to have the possibility to create a workdoc template and to add it automatically to every new item created in a board. 
Thank you, 
Corentin

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It could be nice to have the possibility to create a workdoc template and to add it automatically to every new item created in a board.

Thank you,

Corentin

posts.author: ForTheW (Nathan Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would really like this feature created.

We use a template Monday Doc for each new item in our workflow. Currently, a user has to manually create that every. single. time. Its clunky.

Please come up with a fix Monday - this would be a big time saver!

posts.author: Rhett (Rhett Ovens)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree with this - would love to see this automation supported

posts.author: masonmay (Mason May)
posts.cookedHtml: Completely agree, this automation would be great.
